svg.title: Recursive agent harness architecture for code knowledge graph traversal
svg.desc: Shows the orchestrator spawning agent harnesses that traverse a code knowledge graph, analyzing functions and classes at each node with tool-equipped LLM agents, propagating context recursively.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the traversal orchestrator in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain how the CodeGraph adapter loads and queries the knowledge graph')
sendPrompt('Explain the agent harness agentic loop in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the model client handle the agentic loop?')
sendPrompt('Explain context propagation between parent and child nodes')
g.text: Parent results → child context, data in/out

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how results are aggregated across all nodes')
